meaning: n.专家的地位,特性或方法,专业主义
examples: We were impressed by the professionalism of the staff.
American companies pride themselves on their professionalism.
Professionalism has turned the acquisition of a doctoral degree into a prerequisite for a successful academic career: as late as 1969 a third of American professors did not possess one.
Every day, many in this audience help bear that burden with professionalism, courage, and grace.
What one notices immediately is the utter professionalism with which the place is run.
